finalized_plan.description: Review the loaded diff page’s HTML source for markers of deleted text (commonly marked by tags or classes such as “diff-deletedline” or similar)
Search within the diff for any deleted lines that could contain humorous or non‑encyclopedic content, focusing on content removed on February 29, 2004
Extract the exact text phrase (including punctuation and formatting) represented by the deleted content that qualifies as a joke
Verify that the extracted text is indeed the joke removed and that it originates from the specified leap day edit before 2008
Compose the final answer in three parts: a short summary of the outcome, an extremely detailed explanation of the process and findings, and any additional context
Return the answer via the final_answer tool
